hotel_name: Khách sạn A25 Premium - 142 Bùi Thị Xuân (A25 Premium Hotel - 142 Bùi Thị Xuân)

reviews.title: Great staff but hotel needs renovation
reviews.text:
Pros : Location, staff is extremely kind and helpful
Cons : Hotel is pretty old, it seemed clean but it needs to be renovated in order to meet the standards of other hotels that charges the same price
reviews.response:
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced during your stay at our hotel, especially regarding the condition of the facilities which may not have fully met your expectations. We understand that this may have affected your overall experience. 

At the same time, we truly appreciate your kind comments about our convenient location as well as the friendliness and helpfulness of our staff. Your feedback regarding the need for renovation and upgrades is very valuable to us and will be carefully considered as we continue to improve our facilities and services. 

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future so that we can serve you with our warmest hospitality and provide you with a better stay experience

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: It is located in Bui Thi Xuan Street and close with a big Park. Staffs are friendly and helpful.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Not bad for the value and location. There’s 7/11 nearby and in the morning there are many cafes within walking distance.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. reviews.title: A good budget hotel
reviews.text: If your looking a good budget hotel then this is the place for you. Staff are extremely helpful, but if your a light sleeper do not book the standard rooms as they are next to the elevator on each floor. Sort from that, breakfast is reasonable and staff will do everything to make your stay good
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback about your stay with us. 

We are delighted to know that you found our hotel to be a good value choice and that you appreciated the reasonable breakfast pricing as well as the helpfulness and dedication of our staff. Your kind words are truly motivating for our entire team. 

Regarding your comment about potential noise from standard rooms located near the elevators, we sincerely appreciate your feedback. We will take this into consideration when advising guests during the booking process and will always be happy to assist with room changes whenever possible to ensure a more comfortable stay. 

Once again, thank you for choosing our hotel. We truly hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the future.

reviews.title: Best Stay Among Three Hotels During Our Stay
reviews.text: Reasonable room price for big room, full of facilities and amenities, good and delicious breakfast, hygienic and staff are very friendly. I moved in urgently to this hotel in the midnight due to emergency and we rebooked for the rest of our stay which were available. Best experience of stay during our HCMC trip.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality.

reviews.title: A decent budget hotel
reviews.text:
It's not bad, staff are friendly and supportive, especially after someone tried to open our door at 5am one morning. Breakfast is ala carte with free flow of some fruits, plain bread, simple mini-pastries, coffee and tea and some Vietnamese vegetables.

Short of that standalone safety incident, everything else is good.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 

  

First of all, we would like to sincerely thank you for taking the time to leave a positive review on Agoda. We truly appreciate your kind comments about the friendliness and helpfulness of our staff as well as the breakfast during your stay. 

  

As we discussed previously, regarding the incident of the guest in room 202 who knocked on your door while intoxicated, we sincerely appreciate your understanding and the feedback you shared with us about this matter. 

  

Once again, thank you very much for your support and your positive evaluation. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the future. 

  

Best regards,

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Clean, convenient. Central location. The breakfast service is modest. You have to remind them to serve the dishes. Parking in another place costs 100,000 VND per day.
reviews.response: Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian đánh giá và chia sẻ trải nghiệm. Rất vui khi Quý khách hài lòng về sự sạch sẽ, tiện nghi và vị trí trung tâm của khách sạn. Chúng tôi xin ghi nhận những góp ý của Quý khách về dịch vụ ăn sáng và sẽ rà soát lại quy trình phục vụ để đảm bảo chủ động và chu đáo hơn trong thời gian tới. Về vấn đề gửi xe, do đặc thù khu vực trung tâm nên khách sạn phải liên kết bãi gửi bên ngoài; chúng tôi rất mong nhận được sự thông cảm của Quý khách và sẽ cố gắng hỗ trợ tốt nhất có thể. Một lần nữa xin cảm ơn Quý khách và hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp Quý khách trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo với trải nghiệm tốt hơn.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with an even more comfortable experience in the future.

reviews.title: The online reviews are truly honest!
reviews.text: The staff is enthusiastic in their service, and the cleaning supplies are all provided in large bottles, with complete tubes of toothpaste and facial cleanser, and a whole box of cotton swabs. They offer every service you can think of, including scissors and nail clippers. Shopping and dining nearby are very convenient. The quadruple room is a bit small, but the value for money is undeniable!

reviews.title: 🌟 A Wonderful Stay at A25 Hotel – 142 Bùi Thị Xuân
reviews.text:
Our family had an amazing experience at A25 Hotel – 142 Bùi Thị Xuân! From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel truly welcome. Everyone was friendly, attentive, and always ready to help with a smile. Whether it was assistance with our luggage, quick room service, or helpful local recommendations, the service was exceptional throughout our stay.

The location is excellent — convenient, safe, and close to many local attractions, shops, and restaurants. Getting around the city was so easy, whether we wanted to explore or simply enjoy a quiet walk nearby.

As a family-friendly hotel, A25 Hotel – 142 Bùi Thị Xuân really stood out. The rooms were clean, spacious, and comfortable, providing everything we needed for a relaxing stay. The housekeeping team did a wonderful job keeping everything spotless, and the facilities were well maintained.

We also appreciated how the hotel provided all the little touches that made us feel at home — from daily essentials to a delicious breakfast with plenty of variety. The overall atmosphere was peaceful, welcoming, and perfect for families.

We’re so grateful to the entire team for their warmth and professionalism. A25 Hotel – 142 Bùi Thị Xuân is a fantastic choice for families, couples, or anyone looking for comfort, convenience, and great service in a prime location. We’d happily stay here again and highly recommend it! 🌺
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This is a hotel worth staying at, friendly staff, well-equipped hotel, clean, and delicious breakfast.
reviews.response: Chúng tôi muốn nhân cơ hội này cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn A25 Hotel và chia sẻ trải nghiệm của bạn với chúng tôi. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng bạn đã có một kỳ nghỉ thú vị với A25 Hotel trong chuyến đi này. Rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón bạn quay trở lại để chúng tôi có thể phục vụ bạn với tất cả sự hiếu khách của mình.

reviews.title: Ho Chi Mihn y su hiatoria
reviews.text:
La ubicación del hotel está en el distrito 1 de Ho Chi Minh, el más importante para los turistas y, si bien está en una zona céntrica, hay que caminar unos 15 minutos para el mercado más grande y unos 25 para la avenida central.
El desayuno fue limitado a un plato y a un buffet básico. A nuestro juicio, el desayuno quedó completamente al debe.
La habitación era justa para dos personas y el baño estaba bien equipado.
El personal es lo mejor que tiene el hotel pues atienden con interés y buena disposición y resolvieron todos nuestros requerimientos y solicitudes.
Pedimosuñ un servicio de lavandería que resultó económico y bien realizado.
reviews.response: Nos gustaría aprovechar esta oportunidad para agradecerle por elegir A25 Hotel y por compartir su experiencia con nosotros. Nos complace saber que disfrutó de una agradable estancia en A25 Hotel durante este viaje. Esperamos tener la oportunidad de darle la bienvenida nuevamente para poder atenderle con toda nuestra hospitalidad.

reviews.title: Bon confort
reviews.text: Chambre bien équipée, salle de bain fonctionnelle, personnel au top,je recommande cet hôtel
reviews.response: Nous souhaitons profiter de cette occasion pour vous remercier d’avoir choisi l’hôtel A25 et d’avoir partagé vos impressions avec nous. Nous sommes ravis d’apprendre que vous avez passé un agréable séjour parmi nous. Nous espérons avoir le plaisir de vous accueillir à nouveau afin de vous offrir notre meilleure hospitalité.

reviews.title: Personnel aux petits soins
reviews.text: Les chambres sont agréables avec netflix. Les salles de bains sont spacieuses et bien équipées. le personnel est aux petits soins et très gentils notament les portiers et ceux qui servenet le petit dej vraiment très gentils. L'hôtel est bien placé et à un prix raisonnable. C est propre et les petits déjeuner sont très bons,
reviews.response:
Nous souhaiterions profiter de cette occasion pour vous remercier d’avoir choisi A25 Hotel et d’avoir partagé votre expérience avec nous. Nous sommes ravis d’apprendre que vous avez passé un agréable séjour à A25 Hotel lors de votre voyage.

Nous espérons avoir le plaisir de vous accueillir de nouveau afin de vous offrir toute notre hospitalité.

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.text: A very good hotel with clean rooms, central located, a good breakfast and a lovely hospitality.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality.

reviews.title: Pessime persone
reviews.text: Durante il soggiorno hanno fatto lavori ad ogni ora del giorno e della notte, la foto del lavello sporco di calcinacci è mentre lavavo i denti, i calcinacci mi sono caduti addosso. Ho provato a parlare in reception ma mi hanno letteralmente ignorato compreso un responsabile che ha negato di essere tale
reviews.response:
Innanzitutto, desideriamo porgere le nostre più sincere scuse per le spiacevoli esperienze che ha vissuto durante il Suo soggiorno presso il nostro hotel. 

  

Siamo profondamente dispiaciuti che i lavori di riparazione abbiano disturbato il Suo riposo, soprattutto se effettuati al di fuori degli orari appropriati. La situazione in cui polvere e detriti sono caduti mentre stava utilizzando la camera è assolutamente inaccettabile. Ci scusiamo sinceramente per il disagio e il fastidio che ciò Le ha causato. 

  

Siamo inoltre molto dispiaciuti che abbia avuto la sensazione di non essere stato adeguatamente ascoltato o assistito dal personale della reception e dal responsabile di turno. Questo non rispecchia gli standard di servizio che il nostro hotel si impegna agarantire. Riesamineremo seriamente la questione con i reparti interessati per rivedere le procedure di gestione delle problematiche e la comunicazione con gli ospiti, al fine di evitare che situazioni simili si ripetano.

reviews.title: Ok plekje
reviews.text:
De kamer was prima, de mensen spraken vaak slecht Engels wat het communiceren lastiger maakte. 
Het ontbijt was prima als je vroeg kwam, maar een uur voordat het ontbijt sloot werd er al niet veel meer aangevuld. Ook was ons niet duidelijk dat er ook verschillende dingen vers gemaakt konden worden. De lokatie is vrij ver bij de bezienswaardigheden vandaan.
reviews.response:
Wij danken u hartelijk dat u heeft gekozen om bij A25 Hotel te verblijven en dat u de tijd heeft genomen om uw ervaringen met ons te delen. Het spijt ons zeer dat sommige aspecten van uw verblijf niet volledig aan uw verwachtingen hebben voldaan. 

  

Onze oprechte excuses dat de Engelse communicatievaardigheden van sommige medewerkers nog niet optimaal zijn, wat het voor u moeilijker heeft gemaakt om met ons te communiceren. Het hotel zal de training blijven versterken om de taalvaardigheden van onze medewerkers te verbeteren, zodat wij onze gasten beter kunnen bedienen. 

  

Daarnaast bieden wij onze excuses aan dat het aanvullen van het ontbijt tegen het einde van deontbijttijd niet tijdig gebeurde, en dat de informatie over gerechten die vers op aanvraag bereid kunnen worden niet duidelijk aan u is gecommuniceerd. Wij hebben uw feedback genoteerd en zullen met de betrokken afdelingen samenwerken om dit in de toekomst te verbeteren. 

  

Nogmaals onze oprechte excuses voor de tek

reviews.title: 房間大，乾淨
reviews.text: 冷氣會冷，洗澡水夠熱夠大
reviews.response:
感谢您选择入住A25酒店并分享您的入住体验。我们很高兴得知您对房间的舒适度及相关设施感到满意。我们深知整洁的环境、适宜的室内温度以及稳定的热水供应对于入住体验的重要性。 

您的认可将激励我们持续保持并提升服务品质，期待未来再次为您服务。

reviews.response: 我们衷心感谢您选择入住 A25 酒店并与我们分享您的体验。对于此次入住未能达到您的期望，尤其是在卫生和噪音方面给您带来的不便，我们深表歉意。酒店已认真记录您的反馈，并将加强客房检查及改善隔音措施。我们真诚希望未来有机会再次欢迎您的光临，为您提供最热情周到的服务，不再让您有任何失望之处。

reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: Хороший бюджетный отель с плохими завтраками
reviews.text: Останавливались на 1 ночь, в номерах очень чисто, постельное и полотенца беленькие. Для короткого отдыха отлично + удобное расположение. Но завтраки никакие. Есть нечего, кроме омлета, но даже его тут готовят очень невкусно. Если бы исправили этот момент, то было бы в разы лучше.

reviews.title: Хороший отель в центре
reviews.text:
Я такого набора гигиенических средств, предоставляемых в этом отеле, нигде не встречала)). Есть даже ножницы для стрижки ногтей и презервативы😀
Очень хороший, достойный отель
reviews.response:
Мы хотели бы воспользоваться этой возможностью, чтобы поблагодарить вас за выбор отеля A25 и за то, что поделились с нами своими отзывами.
Мы рады узнать, что ваше пребывание у нас было приятным.
С Нетерпением ждём возможности вновь приветствовать вас и оказать вам наш искренний и тёплый приём.

reviews.title: Zwiedzanie
reviews.text: Czysty, dobrze wyposażony obiekt. Bardzo dobra lokalizacja. Wymaga remontu ale nie przeszkadza w pobycie . Polecam na 2-3 dniowy wypad.
reviews.response: Chcielibyśmy skorzystać z tej okazji, aby podziękować za wybór hotelu A25 oraz podzielenie się z nami swoją opinią. Cieszymy się, że pobyt u nas podczas tej podróży był dla Pana/Pani przyjemny. Mamy nadzieję ponownie powitać Pana/Panią w przyszłości i zapewnić obsługę na najwyższym poziomie.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Sajnos nem tudok jó értékelést írni. Novemberben töltöttünk ott két éjszakát. Az első ami fogadott, a le nem takarított barna foltos wc ülőke. A szobában dohos büdös szag volt, a zuhanyzóban penész. Sokkal jobban kellene figyelniük a higiéniára. A szoba rendkívül pici volt, és ami még zavaróbb a méreténél, hogy nagyon hangos. Éjszaka nem lehetett rendesen pihenni, végig hallottuk az utcazajt, dudaszót. Szerintem nincs is annyira jó helyen, mint amennyire zajos. Az utcán patkányok futkoztak. A személyzet igyekszik az utazók kedvében járni, de sajnos a reggelinél mégis kellemetlen helyzetbe kerültünk. Étlapról kell választani, de nem egyértelmű hogy mit lehet és mennyit. A recepciós segítségét kérte a konyhás nő, de mire kitalálták, hogy mi jár nekünk, nagyon sok idő eltelt. A reggeli minősége elég gyenge volt. Biztosan nem mennék ide vissza.
reviews.response:
Először is szeretnénk őszintén megköszönni, hogy időt szánt tapasztalatai megosztására. Nagyon sajnáljuk, hogy tartózkodása nem felelt meg az elvárásainak, és őszinte elnézését kérjük az okozott kellemetlenségekért. 

  

A szobák tisztaságával, a dohos szaggal és a fürdőszoba állapotával kapcsolatos észrevételeit kiemelt komolysággal kezeljük. Visszajelzéseit azonnal továbbítottuk az illetékes részlegeknek, hogy felülvizsgálják a takarítási és karbantartási folyamatokat, és jobb színvonalat biztosítsunk a jövőbeni vendégek számára. 

  

A zajjal kapcsolatban megértjük panaszát. Mivel szállodánk központi elhelyezkedésű, a külső zajok időnként sajnos nehezen elkerülhetők. Ennek ellenére vizsgáljuk a hangszigetelés javításának lehetőségeit. 

  

Sajnáljuk továbbá, hogy a reggelivel kapcsolatban kellemetlen tapasztalata volt. Az étlap és az árak nem egyértelmű bemutatása a mi hiányosságunk volt. A vezetőség egyeztetni fog a személyzettel a kiszolgálási folyamat javítása, az egyértelműbb
